source: BABOK Guide Chapter 10, as scoped by IIBA ECBA Exam Blueprint V1.1
note: ECBA tests purpose, description, and usage considerations for each technique — not deep mechanics or step-by-step execution.
page_reference_note: Page numbers below are from the standard BABOK Guide v3 pagination (consistent across the official print/PDF edition), cross-checked against multiple independent tables of contents. They're locators only, pointing you to where each technique starts in your own copy — no BABOK text is reproduced here.
content_status: IDs, names, and page numbers confirmed from official IIBA blueprint and cross-checked tables of contents. Purpose/description/usage_considerations fields still need to be populated from your own BABOK Guide v3 copy at the page listed (not included here to avoid reproducing copyrighted BABOK content) — or paste the relevant passage to me and I'll help turn it into original, exam-ready study notes.
